listening.title: Listening: A great year
listening.transcript: I have had so many great experiences this year. I have completed my first marathon. I have also had a new opportunity at work.

listening.title: Listening: Experiences survey
listening.transcript: I have visited Da Lat twice. I have never met a famous person. I have travelled alone once.

questions.question: Has the speaker ever met a famous person?
questions.explanation: "I have never met a famous person."
